title: neuroloma australe
side_effects: Neuroloma australe can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, as well as causing gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Overuse or misuse of the plant can also lead to neurological problems, including headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in extreme cases. Additionally, improper use of Neuroloma australe can result in cardiovascular issues, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits.
